releases.changelog: Initial harness plugin: naming migration, install scripts, migration command, auto-commit, release/versioning, testing strategy, code review/codex integration, architect role, reliability fixes, metadata updates
Consolidated 9 agents to 6 (tester/reviewer/architect absorbed into evaluator), fixed colon filenames, simplified coordinator to 2-agent loop, removed migration command

11 enhancements: codex toggle, domain profiles with BA foundation, feature dependencies, configurable context reset, cost tracking, GAN pattern docs, cross-platform init, subjective quality grading, sprint retrospectives, feature maturity levels, config file
Restructured for Claude Code marketplace (nested plugins/harness/), fixed hooks.json format, created harness-sdlc domain skill with 6 sections covering SDLC best practices

Fixed codex review detection (mandatory pre-flight), expanded sprint artifact enforcement (3→5), added codex detection enforcement in coordinator, added context freshness trace, added runtime verification requirement for software projects
